prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for benzaldehyde (14 atoms) at the DFT level using the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (chemkit tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral closed-shell singlet). Cation state: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion state: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). Density fitting was OFF (exact four-center integrals). All three SCF calculations (neutral, cation, anion) converged. Integrity: trustworthy=true; sum(f+)=1.0000; sum(f-)=1.0000. No engine warnings reported. Headline result: most electrophilic site is atom 3 (carbonyl carbon, C) with f+ = 0.39938965; most nucleophilic site is atom 1 (carbonyl oxygen, O) with f- = 0.23839906. Output JSON: benzaldehyde_fukui_dft.json. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui ... --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1.
